display.name: Hungry Wolf Tracks
display.short_description: Fresh wolf sign crosses the road twice, then disappears into the brush. Something dragged a hare off the path not long ago.

choices.label: Trail the pack sign
choices.summary: Follow the print pattern just long enough to learn where the wolves avoid the road and why.

choices.label: Bait a quick snare
choices.summary: Lift what the wolves left behind, rig a fast snare, and pull free one strip of meat before moving on.
